DatasetTitle: SCHOOLCHILDREN AND STUDENTS IN FULL-TIME EDUCATION LIVING AWAY FROM HOME DURING TERM TIME BY AGE BY SEX
StatisticalPopulations: All full-time students and schoolchildren aged 4 and over living away from home during term time
Annotations: 1. This table only includes schoolchildren and students where information was provided at their home address.; 2. 'Age' is age at last birthday.
